sections.paragraph:
Original: צבי

Transliteration: tsebı̂y

Phonetic: tseb-ee'

BDB Definition:

  1. beauty, glory, honour
    1. beauty, decoration
    2. honour
  2. roebuck, gazelle
    1. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H6638 in the sense of prominence

TWOT entry: 1869a,1870a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
